author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Wishes Assemble at Disneyland: MrBeast, Mark Rober & Avengers Surprise Kids | Disney Unscripted
What happens when MrBeast, the Avengers, and Disney Cast Members come together for one unforgettable mission? 💫
 
In the latest episode of Disney Unscripted, go inside Wishes Assemble at Disneyland Resort - a first-of-its-kind Make-A-Wish event welcoming nearly 40 incredible Wish kids into the role of real-life Avenger for a day filled with surprises.
 
Hosted at Avengers Campus in Disney California Adventure Park, this experience brought together some of the world’s biggest creators, including:  MrBeast, Mark Rober, Dude Perfect and more, alongside Disney Cast Members who helped bring every wish to life in extraordinary ways.
 
Witness Spider-Man art lessons and surprise visits from stars like Anthony Mackie, to Beast Games challenges, science experiments with Science Bob, gaming sessions with Clix and PrestonPlayz, and unforgettable moments across the park. But behind every epic moment was a team of Disney Cast Members making the impossible possible, turning stories into real experiences and helping deliver a day these families will never forget.

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Disneyland Resort:
Disneyland is where imagination is the destination. For young and old, big and small — it's The Happiest Place on Earth! So gather with all the people who make you the happiest and come to the place where dreams come true.
